plan_analysis:
Forecasters need to know how much (and how fast) the 20-year real Treasury yield typically moves, what it is right now, and what might push it sharply up or down before 10 March 2026.  
The pre-research extract only gives the latest available value (2.2 % on 26 Feb) and general series metadata. Missing pieces:

1. Base rate / historical variability: size and frequency of day-to-day moves, typical 7-day swing, and any seasonality around early-March.  
2. Resolution mechanics & revisions: confirmation that DFII20 values sometimes revise, how often, and by how much.  
3. Key drivers: links between DFII20 and nominal 20-yr yields, breakeven inflation, Fed policy expectations, macro data (jobs, CPI).  
4. Current state: latest readings between 27 Feb and 3 Mar, plus real-time quotes for 20-yr TIPS that will feed the official DFII20 print.  
5. Contrarian check: news that could cause an unusual spike or plunge—e.g., surprise data releases, Fed communications, market dislocation.

The queries below supply:  
• Five HISTORICAL searches (trend, volatility, correlations, revision patterns) ≈60 %.  
• Three CURRENT searches (fresh data, market commentary, upcoming catalysts) ≈40 %.

queries_planned.intent: Find studies or raw data showing recent day-to-day and week-to-week variability for the series.
Locate the direct FRED data file for building a quick historical dataset.
Learn how often DFII20 points are revised and typical revision magnitude, informing resolution risk.
Identify historical relationships between real and nominal 20-yr yields to understand drivers.

queries_planned.query: compute daily change distribution DFII20 last 5 years; include mean, stdev, 5th/95th percentiles; output table
queries_planned.intent: Obtain quantitative base-rate stats on yield changes to benchmark plausible ranges by 10 Mar.
Retrieve the most recent quoted real yields and market commentary since 26 Feb.

queries_planned.query: real Treasury yield surge Fed speech
queries_planned.intent: Catch any fresh policy comments or shocks moving real yields this week.

queries_planned.query: upcoming US CPI release March 2026 impact TIPS
queries_planned.intent: Identify near-term economic events (e.g., CPI on 10 Mar) that could swing DFII20 before resolution.
